title: Are Dragons Created or Born? #got #shorts
description: Dragons may not be natural creatures. Some theories suggest they were created through ancient Valyrian magic, combining fire, blood, and experimentation. This changes everything we know about them. #ASOIAF #Dragons #Shorts

scenes.narration: What if dragons were never natural creatures—but something created through magic?
scenes.image_prompt: dragon forming from fire and shadow magic in ritual setting, dark fantasy cinematic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: In the books, the origins of dragons are unclear, but many clues point toward something unnatural.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient texts with dragon sketches and unknown symbols, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Valyrian magic was built on blood and fire, a system capable of shaping life itself.
scenes.image_prompt: blood ritual with fire and magical runes forming living shapes, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Some theories suggest dragons were created by combining creatures through magical experimentation.
scenes.image_prompt: creatures merging through magical transformation into dragon-like form, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: This could explain their unique traits—their fire, intelligence, and deep connection to specific bloodlines.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon eye glowing while connected to human bloodline energy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: It may also explain why only certain families, like the Targaryens, could bond with them.
scenes.image_prompt: Targaryen lineage glowing alongside dragon silhouettes, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: If dragons were created, then they are not just animals—but weapons designed for power.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon used in battle as controlled force of destruction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But like all powerful creations, they may have consequences the creators could never fully control.
scenes.image_prompt: dragon turning uncontrollable in chaotic flames, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Doom of Valyria may be linked to this—an experiment or power that went too far.
scenes.image_prompt: Valyria collapsing under magical catastrophe and volcanic destruction, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because dragons may not just be born—they may be the result of a power the world was never meant to hold.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient dragon shadow rising behind ruined Valyria, ominous ending, vertical 1080x1920
